_comment: NO hooks baked here. Claude hook wiring is written PER-SESSION at seed time into $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/settings.json (see cli_adapters/claude_code.py::_seed_runtime_hooks) so it can be gated by session type — the blocking PermissionRequest/PermissionDenied hooks are registered only for INTERACTIVE sessions, NOT one-shot autoTerminateAfterEndTurn workflow runs (which would otherwise strand on a permission prompt). Baked hooks here applied to every session indiscriminately and overrode --dangerously-skip-permissions for one-shot runs.
